title: Golden Smoky Hashbrowns
description: A savory twist on classic hashbrowns, infused with the deep smokiness of Ukrainian-style cooking.
instructions: 2. Peel the Yukon gold potatoes and grate them using a box grater or food processor.
3. In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, smoky savory seasoning, and hash browns. Mix well.
4. Using your hands, shape the potato mixture into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
5. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Drizzle with a little bit of oil and gently toss to coat.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, flipping the patties halfway through.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
